raw_title: The Limits of Computational Propaganda: Investigating Underexplored Platforms and Contexts
title_en: The Limits of Computational Propaganda: Investigating Underexplored Platforms and Contexts
title_zh: 计算宣传的局限性：探索未充分研究的平台与情境
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了计算宣传（即利用算法和自动化工具进行政治宣传）的局限性，重点关注那些较少被研究的网络平台和不同社会文化背景。
plain_summary_en: This research examines the limitations of computational propaganda (using algorithms and automated tools for political messaging), focusing on understudied digital platforms and diverse sociocultural contexts.
research_direction_zh: 探索数字时代政治宣传的新形式及其在不同平台和情境下的效果与限制。
research_direction_en: Investigating new forms of political propaganda in the digital age and their effectiveness/limitations across various platforms and contexts.
